use_cases: Hero section background for landing pages with immersive animated visuals
Animated decorative background for marketing and promotional sites
Dynamic visual backdrop for outdoor and adventure-themed brands
Environmental background for storytelling and portfolio websites
Engaging header section for travel and nature-related products
ai_summary: A parallax-animated mountain landscape background featuring multiple depth layers with mountains and cyclists moving at varying speeds. Uses CSS animations to create smooth, continuous parallax scrolling effects that simulate 3D depth. Ideal for hero sections and landing pages where an immersive, dynamic visual experience enhances brand storytelling without requiring user interaction.
